title: Phase 3.2 cross-cutting compliance manifest
description: Authoritative manifest shape for Phase 3.2: cross-cutting UCs outside cat-22 get multi-regulation clause-level compliance[]. Read by scripts/generate_phase3_2_cross_cutting.py which creates minimal JSON sidecars under use-cases/cat-NN/uc-<id>.json.

$schema.description: Optional IDE-tooling hint pointing to this schema.

description.description: Human-readable description of the manifest scope and intent.

generated_by.description: Free-form note on authoring provenance (e.g. 'hand-curated in Phase 3.2').

generator_entrypoint.description: Path to the generator script that consumes this manifest.

out_of_scope.description: Explicit scope exclusions (e.g. cat-22, derivative privacy regulations).

ucs.description: Per-UC mappings. Each entry identifies the target UC and the compliance[] entries to add.

uc_id.description: UC identifier (category.subcategory.index). MUST NOT start with '22.' — cat-22 UCs are owned by other generators.

title.description: Human-readable UC title. Must exactly match the markdown heading (leading '· ' is stripped by the generator).

mappings.description: Clause-level compliance entries to insert into the target UC's compliance[] array.

regulation.description: Regulation name. MUST resolve via data/regulations.json aliasIndex / shortName / name.

version.description: Regulation version (must match a version id in data/regulations.json).

clause.description: Specific clause/article/control ID as written in the authoritative source. Must match clauseGrammar for the regulation+version.

clauseUrl.description: Deep link to the clause in the authoritative source.

mode.description: satisfies: UC demonstrates compliance with the clause. detects-violation-of: UC fires on a violation of the clause.

assurance.description: Confidence level: full = sole sufficient evidence; partial = one of several controls; contributing = useful context but not a primary control.

assurance_rationale.description: One-line explanation of why this assurance level was selected.
